description: Tests a named global integer flag against a value.

description: Compares two named global variables against each other.

description: True if the player character is the specified class.

Tests a character's skill score against a value using an enum skill type. PoE1 only.

fullName: Boolean IsSkillValue(Guid, Guid, Operator, Int32, Boolean, Boolean)
description: Tests a character's skill score against a value. PoE2 uses a GameData GUID to identify the skill.

parameters.name: Is Assisted
parameters.description: If true, includes assistance from other party members.

parameters.name: Hide Notification If Failure
parameters.description: Suppresses failure notification in scripted interactions.

description: True if the specified character worships the given deity.
True if the specified character belongs to the given Paladin order.
True if the player's disposition on the given axis meets or exceeds the specified rank.
True if the player's disposition on the given axis equals the specified rank exactly.
True if the player's reputation rank with a named faction exactly matches the given rank.

displayName: Tagged Reputation Rank Greater or Equal
description: True if the player's reputation rank with a named faction meets or exceeds the given rank.
